channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: What to Know About Ayatollah Ali Khamenei as His Funeral Services Begin in Iran
item.source: The New York Times (+2 other sources)
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- A glimpse of Khamenei’s state funeral in Iran]]>
